message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first MCP helpers + tool dispatch (tick 258)

Migrates 10 ambient storage calls across 2 MCP modules in
`frankenterm-core/` to their `_with_cx` siblings.

**`mcp_helpers.rs` (2 sites):**

- `resolve_pane_capabilities` L352: `get_active_reservation_with_cx(&reservation_cx, pane_id)`
- `record_mcp_audit` L508: `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&audit_cx, audit)`

These mirror the tick-253 sweep of `mcp.rs` — both files contain these
helper fns (the sites were split during an earlier refactor; both must
be kept in sync for MCP audit + pane-cap resolution coherence).

**`mcp_tools.rs` (8 sites):**

- `list_events` tool L1646/L1656: event query + per-event annotation
  loop (shared `events_cx` binding hoisted above the `for`)
- `list_accounts` tool L3167: `get_accounts_by_service_with_cx` in
  the runtime.block_on wrapper (uses scratch StorageHandle)
- `refresh_account` tool L3327: `get_accounts_by_service_with_cx`
  post-policy-check lookup
- 4 audit-write sites (replace_all): MCP event.annotate + related
  tools now route `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&audit_cx, audit)`
  through cx-aware mpsc backpressure

Cx bindings resolved via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` in
each async scope — MCP tool handlers run on a CompatRuntime per-request
thread that picks up Cx from the MCP dispatch loop.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 72 (187-258).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 31 (runtime 7 + mcp 2 + tui 8 + web 4
+ mcp_helpers 2 + mcp_tools 8).
main.rs cross-crate total: 127 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
